arts.ttl: Brendan Rodgers takes EFL coaches under his wing, four attend Celtic training and match
arts.sum: “Four Swansea City Academy coaches recently linked up with former Swans manager Brendan Rodgers and his coaching staff to learn of his football philosophies and knowledge at Scottish Premiership side Celtic,” Swansea’s post read. “Swansea coaches Anthony Wright, Liam McGarry, Paul Wavell and Sam Morris were invited on a trip to Scotland to learn from the former Liverpool manager and his staff, before attending their 3-0 Scottish Premiership win over Dundee United.”

arts.ttl: Yang Hyun-jun names 'best part' about life at Celtic amid standout form
arts.sum: Celtic winger Yang Hyun-jun says the best part about life at the club is turning out alongside 'great players'.

arts.ttl: Luke McCowan explains what feels 'different' about Celtic training
arts.sum: Luke McCowan says Celtic having full week to train is ‘different’ So it’s nice for me to be in and get a full week training again.

arts.ttl: Celtic's Jeffrey Schlupp makes surprising Hibs admission ahead of Scottish Cup tie
arts.sum: Jeffrey Schlupp says Celtic's loss to Hibernian a fortnight ago is still sore as the sides prepare to meet in the Scottish Cup this weekend.

arts.ttl: Celtic player makes manager ‘regret’ blocking his transfer – Owner had closed deal
arts.sum: Celtic’s Luis Palma joined Olympiacos on loan in the winter market after Brendan Rodgers’ decision to not utilise him regularly at Celtic Park. The temporary move has helped him feature regularly as he’s played 320 minutes from six games. He’s managed a goal and an assist, and it came in Olympiacos’ 6-0 win over AEK The post Celtic player makes manager ‘regret’ blocking his transfer – Owner had closed deal appeared first on Sport Witness.

arts.ttl: I played for Celtic against Real Madrid but now I'm hanging up my boots to become a fashion guru
arts.sum: Bruno Davidson has been a regular fixture in Celtic's B team but has opted for a change of career

arts.ttl: Brendan Rodgers details 'pretty unique' aspect of Celtic's preparation for Hibs tie
arts.sum: Celtic manager Brendan Rodgers says it's 'pretty unique' that his team has had over a week to prepare for their Scottish Cup tie against Hibernian on Sunday.

arts.ttl: Celtic youngster leaves behind football to pursue fashion business
arts.sum: Celtic youngster Bruno Davidson has given up football to pursue his own fashion business.

arts.ttl: Saturday's Transfer Talk Update: Jordan Smith, Kobbie Mainoo, Liam Delap
arts.sum: Sports Mole rounds up the latest confirmed transfer news and speculation from across the footballing world.

arts.ttl: Lewis Miller insists Celtic livewires Daizen Maeda and Jota are his 'favourite' challenge as Hibs feel 'unbreakable'
arts.sum: Aussie is in confident mood ahead of Hibs heading to Celtic Park for Sunday's Scottish Cup quarter final.
